ref_text_raw: The Giza Plateau, or "Giza Necropolis" in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids (of which the great pyramid is the largest), several small tombs, several temples, and the great Sphinx.
ref_text_normalized: the giza plateau or giza necropolis in the egyptian valley of the dead contains several pyramids of which the great pyramid is the largest several small tombs several temples and the great sphinx
text: The Giza Plateau or Giza Necropolis in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids, of which the Great Pyramid is the largest, several tombs, several temples and the Great Sphinx.

params.note: autoDecodingConfig; punctuation etc. = API defaults (R-2.4); no diarization

metadata.prompt:
Transcribe the following speech segment in English. Follow these specific instructions for formatting the answer:
* Only output the transcript, with no newlines.
* When transcribing numbers, write the digits, i.e. write 1.7 and not one point seven, and write 100 instead of one hundred etc.
* Only output the transcript, exactly as said in the speech segment.
* Do not continue the speech segment.
* Include everything said in the speech segment.
* Use mathematical notation where needed, eg. x ^ 6Y.
* If there is background speech that is not part of the main conversation, discard the background speech and only output the main conversation.
* If there is no clear speech, just output [BACKGROUND].
* Respond in the original language of the speech, English.

alternatives.transcript: The Giza Plateau or Giza Necropolis in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids, of which the Great Pyramid is the largest, several tombs, several temples and the Great Sphinx.
